Classic.name: classic
Classic.label: Airy
Classic.info: Loose, faint crossing lines — inspired by the sketchy brush in Harmony.
Classic.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 6 L12 11 M4 11.5 L13 5 M3 9 L11 9"/></svg>

Classic.name: web
Classic.label: String Art
Classic.info: Sparse, strong strands stretched between dots — inspired by the web brush in Harmony.
Classic.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/><path d="M12 3 V21 M3 12 H21 M6 6 L18 18 M18 6 L6 18"/><path d="M12 6 A6 6 0 0 1 18 12 M12 6 A6 6 0 0 0 6 12"/></svg>

Classic.name: shaded
Classic.label: Shading
Classic.info: Dense, distance-faded lines that build smooth tone — inspired by the shaded brush in Harmony.
Classic.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 10 L8 5 M5 12.5 L11 6 M8 13 L13 8"/></svg>

Classic.name: chroma
Classic.label: Chroma
Classic.info: Short, inset crossing lines in random darkened tones that build a metallic sheen - a port of the chrome brush in Harmony.

More.name: glow
More.label: Glow
More.info: Faint single-hued strands that pile into a luminous halo - additive light on the dark canvas.

More.name: bloom
More.label: Bloomer
More.info: Your stroke blooms - dots multiply into a full glowing web. Made for mandalas.
More.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="2"/><path d="M8 1 V4 M8 12 V15 M1 8 H4 M12 8 H15 M3.2 3.2 L5.3 5.3 M10.7 10.7 L12.8 12.8 M12.8 3.2 L10.7 5.3 M5.3 10.7 L3.2 12.8"/></svg>

More.name: bloomtex
More.label: Bloom Texture
More.info: A fine dotted bloom: dense specks scattered tight around your stroke, barely linked.
More.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="1"/><circle cx="8" cy="3" r="1"/><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="1"/><circle cx="3" cy="8" r="1"/><circle cx="7.5" cy="8.5" r="1"/><circle cx="11" cy="8" r="1"/><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1"/><circle cx="9" cy="13" r="1"/><circle cx="13" cy="11" r="1"/></svg>

More.name: fur
More.label: Fur
More.info: Combed pelt — dense soft guard hairs that taper, sweep and fray.

More.name: lace
More.label: Lace
More.info: Fine crossing net of floating, dotted scallops.
More.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 8 A2 2 0 0 1 6 8 A2 2 0 0 1 10 8 A2 2 0 0 1 14 8"/><circle cx="2" cy="8" r="0.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="6" cy="8" r="0.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="10" cy="8" r="0.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="14" cy="8" r="0.9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>
